title: Mesenchymal Stem Cell-Derived Extracellular Vesicles and Plant-Derived Nanovesicles as Cell-Free Therapies for Thermal Burn Healing: A Systematic Review of Preclinical Evidence and Delivery Strategies.
snippet: Thermal injuries represent a significant global health burden, often complicated by hypertrophic scarring, chronic inflammation, and delayed re-epithelialization. While Mesenchymal Stem Cell (MSC) transplantation has shown promise, its clinical translation is hindered by risks of tumorigenicity and immunological concerns.
